title: Star Command Galaxies

cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Runs fine out of the box, but you have to use the Windows version (Right-Click > Properties > Force use of Steam Compatibility Tool (the last option on the first page). This is necessary, since the Linux client does start but crashes afterwards and is not working at all. According to the devs, the Linux client is not finished and not intended to work for now.
title: Star Command Galaxies
